title: Collection contents should be preferred
description: Collection contents should be usedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellunusedsuspiciousWhy is this an issue?More InfoA collection is a data structure that holds multiple values, such as an array or a map. If a collection is declared and populated, but its values are never read anywhere in the code, it can be considered unused code. This can be due to some refactoring, copy-pasting, or typing errors.Unused collections can waste memory usage and slow down the application’s performance.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
